LanguageData.LBD_Fatalis_Race.label: Miraboreasu
LanguageData.LBD_Fatalis_Race.description: One of the Elder Dragons, the body has a long snake neck and tail, and a pair of huge and strong wings. The whole body is covered with hard black scales, and white spikes are arranged on the back. The head has four backward-curved horns, several rows of huge teeth, and fin-like ears.\n\nAt least that's what the legends say.
LanguageData.LBD_Fatalis_Race.tools.龙爪.label: Dragon Claw
LanguageData.LBD_Fatalis_Race.comps.1.availablePreset: Miraboreasu's armor possesses powerful protection, providing the creature with all-around resistance to damage. However, while wearing this armor, the super-regeneration ability cannot be activated.
Clothes worn by the Miraboreasu when not in combat. Although they have little defensive value, they are lighter than armor and allow the use of super-regeneration abilities.
LanguageData.LBD_Miraboreasu_Style.label: Miraboreasu
LanguageData.LBD_Miraboreasu_Hair.label: Miraboreasu's Hair
